channel.title: dinner-inspiration Posts - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh dinner-inspiration posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: Creamy Chicken and Mushroom Stew That Feels Like a Warm Hug
item.description: This cozy stew combines tender chicken with earthy mushrooms in a rich, creamy sauce that's perfect for chilly nights. It’s a one-pot wonder that’s both comforting and easy to whip up when you want something hearty without fuss.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1.5 lbs boneless skinless chicken thighs, cut into chunks
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 medium onion, finely chopped
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 12 oz cremini mushrooms, sliced
  • 1 teaspoon dried thyme
  • 1/2 cup dry white wine or chicken broth
  • 2 cups chicken broth
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • 2 tablespoons all-purpose flour
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 2 tablespoons chopped fresh parsley, for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230383494 #Mediumpost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #olive #medium

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends
